problem.title: DLIO throughput and accuracy trade-off on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames, residential)
problem.question: Which DLIO profile should stay as the current default on KITTI Raw drive 0061 full sequence (703 frames)?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: Baseline DLIO-style GICP keyframe odometry with default IMU/LiDAR fusion weights.
variants.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser downsampling, fewer GICP iterations, lighter IMU fusion influence.
variants.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer voxels, deeper GICP, stronger IMU term when imu.csv is present.
variants.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
